scenario_scope: Real local-project intake decision for the pinned BugBrain bare-metal AI system snapshot.

cases.decision_rationale: BugBrain makes physical-core ownership, bounded context persistence, privileged-action lifecycle, resource admission, and deployment state concrete enough to strengthen existing authority, context, execution, resource, security, and readiness chapters.
required_before_drafting: map each mechanism to its exact chapter owner
evidence_transition_preconditions: accepted transition required for any support-state change
promotion_blockers: Pi hardware and bridge suites not reproduced
complete trained artifact lineage not established
independent security and embedded-runtime literature not yet ingested
non_claims: does not establish intelligence, safety, security, efficiency, or production readiness
does not treat source-file presence as integrated capability

cases.decision_rationale: The project provides concrete negative cases for capacity/residency conflation, mismatched memory arithmetic, theory-name laundering, fixed random cognitive modules, objective terms without decision effect, skipped checks marked green, host/status workloads overextended to target claims, narrative/machine-report contradiction, and protocol security overextended to hardware-root claims.
required_before_drafting: cite machine-readable artifacts and exact code behavior
separate historical report state from current source state
avoid reproducing private raw logs or credentials
evidence_transition_preconditions: exact implementation and report references available
negative-case wording does not generalize beyond the pinned snapshot
accepted transition required for any support-state change
non_claims: does not prove the whole system or cryptographic implementation insecure
does not establish that every historical readiness claim is false

cases.decision_rationale: Context Horizon and the compiled typed graph add a hardware-bounded persistence, tiering, journaling, tagging, generation-lease, and ontology-compilation implementation to BeastBrain's broader DKL lineage. This strengthens but does not yet resolve the provisional chapter boundary.
required_before_drafting: mine Trainer and Best Model plus any new projects
ingest independent durable-memory and crash-consistency sources
complete boundary review against VCA, context transactions, claim ledgers, and procedural memory
promotion_blockers: no end-to-end durable-memory retrieval quality result reproduced
non_claims: does not add the proposed chapter
does not establish Context Horizon retrieval quality or novelty

validation_boundary: Records reviewed existing-chapter routes and a deferred durable-memory boundary contribution. It does not validate project capability, hardware performance, security, scientific metrics, publication rights, or a support-state transition.
non_claims: does not publish private source material
